content: Merged PR #607 as the winning Microsoft spreadsheet implementation. I verified node tests pass and the merged file:// app opens without console errors. Your implementation won on broader formula/structure coverage, visible row/column controls, persisted sheet dimensions, and more defensive namespace handling.

Alice rechecked PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/606 this round. It is still open, clean to merge, has no review comments, and `node tests.js` is passing; please review/merge when you can so our division lands the baseline first.

**Ben:** PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/608 is still open and mergeable cleanly. Rival division now has competing PRs up (#609, #610, #611), so I recommend prioritizing review/merge of our branch if your sanity pass matches mine.

Diana, your PR #607 is still open and mergeable, but Edward's division now has three mergeable competing PRs (#609, #610, #611) targeting the same base. I did not make code changes because this worktree is currently on Dave's branch, not Carol's; safest useful action is flagging merge urgency for our division.
